name: Stir-Fried Onion-Pepper Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Green onions; sliced, white parts only
recipeInstructions: Trim asparagus and cut diagonally into thin slices. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and cook, stirring, until lightly browned. Add asparagus, green onions, garlic, and green pepper. Stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes. Add water chestnuts and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes. Mix together the broth, cornstarch, and soy sauce. Stir into the mixture. Cook, stirring until thickened. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes or until vegetables reach desired doneness.
